name: TenantLifecycleManager

ironRules.rule: Tenant suspension MUST use updateDocument ONLY — deleteDocument is prohibited. Deletion destroys the audit trail and makes recovery impossible. TenantSuspended MUST carry cascadeToSubscriptions: true.

Subscription cascade on suspension MUST be handled via TenantSuspended event (cascadeToSubscriptions: true) — never direct service call to subscription service. Inter-service calls via HTTP are prohibited (Rule 11).
Data purge MUST be delegated via DataPurgeRequested event — T608 MUST NOT perform direct data deletion. tombstoneRef MUST be a one-way hash (SHA-256) of tenantId — never the raw tenantId.
DataPurgeRequested MUST only be emitted during termination flow — NEVER during suspension. Conflating suspension with purge risks irreversible data loss for recoverable suspended tenants.
tenantId MUST be resolved from AsyncLocalStorage only — NEVER from request payload.

keywords: tenant lifecycle manager suspend not delete updateDocument cascadeToSubscriptions TenantSuspended DataPurgeRequested tombstoneRef SHA-256 one-way hash TenantTerminated compliance audit trail
